race.comment: JUST LANDED (6) took 22 runs to finally break the maiden two back over the mile at this track. Worked home well to get up for second at his latest appearance over 2050m at Wodonga. Going as well as he can and in an even race he is as good a chance as any. CALL ME RHONDA (7) chimed in late to collect her maiden win recently over 1600m at Stawell. Open to further improvement over this longer journey at just the third run of the preparation. Loves heavy going so monitor the track conditions. TAUPO TIGER (10) hasn't won for nearly three years but his last two efforts have been encouraging. Loves the soft ground and will run this out strongly. BIRDIE TIME (3) has disappointed this prep but might be worth one more chance with a tongue tie going on today. MAKUSHA (8) showed a glimpse of form when strong late over 2112m at Echuca nine days ago. Each-way chance with a repeat performance.
